```{=html}
<style>
/* ── globals ── */
#keyboard-root *{box-sizing:border-box}#keyboard-root,#keyboard-root{margin:0;padding:0}
#keyboard-root{
  --mw-mint:#7ac4b4;--mw-teal:#00acc3;--mw-deep-teal:#0d6f7f;
  --mw-pink:#f4bbca;--mw-rose:#d989a4;--mw-ink:#163933;
  --mw-paper:#f7fffd;--mw-border:#abd9d0;
  --font-body:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
  --font-display:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;
}#keyboard-root{color:var(--mw-ink);background:#f6fcf9;font-family:var(--font-body);line-height:1.5}
a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
.container{width:min(1120px,92vw);margin:0 auto}
.section{padding:clamp(18px,3vw,36px) 0}
.section.alt{
  position:relative;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(246,255,252,.95),rgba(246,255,252,.95));
  border-top:1px solid rgba(134,201,190,.5);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(134,201,190,.5);
}

/* ── keyboard-diagram-studio module CSS ── */
.keyboard-diagram-studio_sectionShell__R2KLw{padding-top:clamp(18px,2.8vw,28px)}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_editorShell__hN7jA{display:grid;gap:10px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_feedbackToast__xkCcV{align-self:flex-start;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(171,217,208,.88);background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);color:#145a66;font-size:.8rem;letter-spacing:.01em}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_headerLink__uYexN,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuActionButton__umJIe,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuCloseButton___MZmp,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_primaryButton__MkUmh,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_segmentButton__9izws{
  appearance:none;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(134,201,190,.88);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);color:#145a66;cursor:pointer;
  font-family:var(--font-display);font-size:.84rem;letter-spacing:.01em;
  padding:8px 11px;text-decoration:none;transition:background-color .2s,border-color .2s,transform .2s,color .2s
}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_headerLink__uYexN:hover,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuActionButton__umJIe:hover,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL:hover,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuCloseButton___MZmp:hover,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx:hover,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_primaryButton__MkUmh:hover,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_segmentButton__9izws:hover{transform:translateY(-1px)}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL:disabled,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx:disabled{opacity:.46;cursor:default;transform:none}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuBar__146hP,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuPanel__nHKlJ,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolDock__dsAU8,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_stageFrame__u4F_0{
  border-radius:20px;border:1px solid rgba(171,217,208,.88);
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.94),rgba(249,255,253,.96));
  box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(24,54,49,.08)
}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuBar__146hP{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolDock__dsAU8{display:none;gap:6px;padding:7px;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolDock__dsAU8::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx{font-size:.73rem;padding:9px 6px;flex:0 0 auto;white-space:nowrap}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButtonActive__NpUZ_,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButtonActive__wasQX,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_segmentButtonActive___MDmq{border-color:rgba(13,111,127,.9);background:rgba(15,125,142,.12);color:#0d6f7f}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_dangerButtonActive__XIv2b{border-color:rgba(177,51,55,.9);background:rgba(177,51,55,.12);color:#9d1e24}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_dangerButtonActive__XIv2b:hover{background:rgba(177,51,55,.18)}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_addActionButton__k5Ppi{border-color:rgba(13,111,127,.95);background:rgba(13,111,127,.14);color:#0b5562}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_addActionButton__k5Ppi:hover{background:rgba(13,111,127,.22)}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuSpacer__MUjwf{flex:1 1 auto}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_primaryButton__MkUmh{border-color:rgba(13,111,127,.9);background:#0f7d8e;color:#effffd}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuPanel__nHKlJ{padding:8px 10px 10px;position:relative;z-index:12}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuPanelHeader__yQ0Od{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;margin-bottom:6px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuGrid__52lKA{margin-top:0;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:8px;align-items:start}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_panelBlock__eOd7w{display:grid;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid rgba(171,217,208,.72);background:rgba(255,255,255,.78)}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_compactPanel__UfzzJ{gap:8px 12px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_compactWide___0tKs{grid-column:1/-1}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuBackdrop___fkph{display:none}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuActions__P2KR2{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px 6px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuDescription__0jiXX{margin:0;color:#355a53;font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.45}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_stageFrame__u4F_0{padding:14px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_stageSurface__VbdYa{position:relative;overflow:hidden;border-radius:18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.46)}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_transparentPreview__UPS2Y{background-image:linear-gradient(45deg,rgba(227,241,237,.76) 25%,transparent 0),linear-gradient(-45deg,rgba(227,241,237,.76) 25%,transparent 0),linear-gradient(45deg,transparent 75%,rgba(227,241,237,.76) 0),linear-gradient(-45deg,transparent 75%,rgba(227,241,237,.76) 0);background-size:24px 24px;background-position:0 0,0 12px,12px -12px,-12px 0}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_stageScroll__V9tWE{overflow:auto;overscroll-behavior-x:contain;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;padding-bottom:4px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_stageCanvas__jK2Dp{position:relative;display:block;margin:0 auto;width:var(--stage-width);max-width:none}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_stageSvg__3ivrT{display:block;width:100%;height:auto}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_newObjectPulseBox__YlbvT,
.keyboard-diagram-studio_newObjectPulseDot__a37yy{transform-box:fill-box;transform-origin:center;animation:kds_pulse 1.2s ease-out}
@keyframes kds_pulse{0%{opacity:0;transform:scale(.86)}28%{opacity:.95;transform:scale(1)}to{opacity:0;transform:scale(1.08)}}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_field__pE7xQ{display:grid;gap:4px;color:#234941;font-size:.84rem}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_field__pE7xQ>span{color:#35615a;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_control__vMrCj{width:100%;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(171,217,208,.92);background:#fff;color:#163933;font:inherit;padding:6px 10px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_control__vMrCj:focus{outline:none;border-color:rgba(0,172,195,.54);box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(0,172,195,.12)}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_colorControl__YDWyI{min-height:42px;padding:6px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_colorRow__UTNlr{display:grid;gap:6px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_colorInlineRow__yRa7g{display:grid;gap:8px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_labelSettingsRow__vRl7Q{display:grid;gap:8px 12px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_swatchRow__tMV1_{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_swatchDivider__QEXqc{align-self:stretch;width:1px;min-height:30px;margin:0 3px;background:rgba(22,57,51,.24)}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_colorSwatch__qFMhH{appearance:none;width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:999px;border:2px solid rgba(22,57,51,.18);cursor:pointer;padding:0}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_segmentRow__Usg0n{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_toggleSegmentRow__SQB3i{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_toggleSegmentRow__SQB3i .keyboard-diagram-studio_segmentButton__9izws{width:100%;justify-content:center}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_segmentButton__9izws{padding:5px 8px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_toggleRow__MmGPi{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;color:#234941;font-size:.9rem}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_toggleControl__QUarr{width:20px;height:20px;accent-color:#0f7d8e}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_rangeRow__h7FlT{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_rangeControl__R7GD4{width:100%;accent-color:#0f7d8e}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_rangeValue__YV_KA{min-width:56px;text-align:right;color:#2e6e68;font-size:.84rem}
.keyboard-diagram-studio_bottomLinks__8NxkB{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end}
@media(min-width:861px){
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_compactPanel__UfzzJ{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_colorInlineRow__yRa7g{grid-template-columns:minmax(120px,148px) minmax(0,1fr);align-items:center}
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_labelSettingsRow__vRl7Q{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 128px;align-items:end}
}
@media(max-width:720px){
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_sectionShell__R2KLw{padding-top:12px}
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_editorShell__hN7jA{gap:8px;padding-bottom:calc(88px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0px))}
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_menuBar__146hP{display:none}
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolDock__dsAU8{display:flex;position:sticky;top:8px;z-index:9}
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_stageFrame__u4F_0{padding:8px}
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_stageCanvas__jK2Dp{width:min(100%,var(--stage-width))}
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_bottomLinks__8NxkB{justify-content:stretch}
}
@media(max-width:560px){
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_menuActions__P2KR2,.keyboard-diagram-studio_segmentRow__Usg0n{width:100%}
  .keyboard-diagram-studio_menuActionButton__umJIe,.keyboard-diagram-studio_menuCloseButton___MZmp,.keyboard-diagram-studio_primaryButton__MkUmh,.keyboard-diagram-studio_segmentButton__9izws{flex:1 1 100%;justify-content:center}
}
</style>

<div id="keyboard-root">
<section class="section alt keyboard-diagram-studio_sectionShell__R2KLw">
<div class="container">
<div class="keyboard-diagram-studio_editorShell__hN7jA">

  <div id="feedbackToast" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_feedbackToast__xkCcV" style="display:none"></div>

  <!-- Desktop toolbar -->
  <div id="menuBar" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuBar__146hP" role="toolbar" aria-label="Keyboard diagram tools">
    <button id="btn-keyboard"  class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL">Keyboard</button>
    <button id="btn-label-all" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL">Label All</button>
    <button id="btn-addText"   class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL keyboard-diagram-studio_addActionButton__k5Ppi">Add Text</button>
    <button id="btn-addDot"    class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL keyboard-diagram-studio_addActionButton__k5Ppi">Add Dot</button>
    <button id="btn-delete"    class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL" disabled>Delete</button>
    <button id="btn-undo"      class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL" disabled>Undo</button>
    <button id="btn-redo"      class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL" disabled>Redo</button>
    <button id="btn-reset"     class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL">Reset</button>
    <div class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuSpacer__MUjwf"></div>
    <button id="btn-canvas"    class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL">Canvas</button>
    <button id="btn-exportSVG" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuActionButton__umJIe">Export SVG</button>
    <button id="btn-copyPNG"   class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuActionButton__umJIe">Copy PNG</button>
    <button id="btn-exportPNG" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_primaryButton__MkUmh">Export PNG</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Mobile toolbar -->
  <div id="mobileToolDock" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolDock__dsAU8" aria-label="Keyboard diagram tools">
    <button id="mbtn-keyboard"  class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx">Keyboard</button>
    <button id="mbtn-label-all" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx">Labels</button>
    <button id="mbtn-addText"   class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx keyboard-diagram-studio_addActionButton__k5Ppi">Add Text</button>
    <button id="mbtn-addDot"    class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx keyboard-diagram-studio_addActionButton__k5Ppi">Add Dot</button>
    <button id="mbtn-delete"    class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx" disabled>Delete</button>
    <button id="mbtn-undo"      class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx" disabled>Undo</button>
    <button id="mbtn-redo"      class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx" disabled>Redo</button>
    <button id="mbtn-reset"     class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx">Reset</button>
    <button id="mbtn-canvas"    class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx">Canvas</button>
    <button id="mbtn-copyPNG"   class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx">Copy PNG</button>
    <button id="mbtn-exportSVG" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx">Export SVG</button>
    <button id="mbtn-exportPNG" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_primaryButton__MkUmh">Export PNG</button>
  </div>

  <div id="menuPanel" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuPanel__nHKlJ" style="display:none">
    <div class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuPanelHeader__yQ0Od">
      <button id="menuCloseBtn" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuCloseButton___MZmp">Close</button>
    </div>
    <div id="menuContent" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_menuGrid__52lKA"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="keyboard-diagram-studio_stageFrame__u4F_0">
    <div id="stageSurface" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_stageSurface__VbdYa">
      <div class="keyboard-diagram-studio_stageScroll__V9tWE">
        <div id="stageCanvas" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_stageCanvas__jK2Dp" style="--stage-width:800px">
          <svg id="kbdSvg" class="keyboard-diagram-studio_stageSvg__3ivrT"
               role="img" aria-label="Keyboard diagram preview"></svg>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="keyboard-diagram-studio_bottomLinks__8NxkB">
    <span class="keyboard-diagram-studio_headerLink__uYexN">Keyboard Diagram Generator — Local Copy</span>
  </div>

</div><!-- editorShell -->
</div><!-- container -->
</section>

<script>
'use strict';
// ── constants ──
const NOTES   = ["C","C#","D","D#","E","F","F#","G","G#","A","A#","B"];
const W_NOTES = ["C","D","E","F","G","A","B"];
const BLACK   = new Set(["C#","D#","F#","G#","A#"]);
const FLATS   = {"C#":"Db","D#":"Eb","F#":"Gb","G#":"Ab","A#":"Bb"};
const DIMS    = { ww:72, wh:250, bw:42, bh:156, ls:15, la:38, lb:46 };
const PAD_FIT = { top:52, right:44, bottom:56, left:44 };
const ACC_COLORS = ["#0f7d8e","#00acc3","#7ac4b4","#f4bbca","#f28482"];
const FIXED_COLORS = [{v:"#111111",l:"black"},{v:"#ffffff",l:"white"},{v:"#d9dde2",l:"grey"}];
const FILL_STYLES = ["solid","transparent","diagonal","horizontal","vertical"];

// ── CSS class aliases ──
const C = {
  menuBtn:      "keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButton__y_vOL",
  mbtn:         "keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButton__CYFgx",
  btnActive:    "keyboard-diagram-studio_menuButtonActive__NpUZ_",
  mbtnActive:   "keyboard-diagram-studio_mobileToolButtonActive__wasQX",
  segBtn:       "keyboard-diagram-studio_segmentButton__9izws",
  segActive:    "keyboard-diagram-studio_segmentButtonActive___MDmq",
  danger:       "keyboard-diagram-studio_dangerButtonActive__XIv2b",
  panelBlock:   "keyboard-diagram-studio_panelBlock__eOd7w",
  compact:      "keyboard-diagram-studio_compactPanel__UfzzJ",
  wide:         "keyboard-diagram-studio_compactWide___0tKs",
  actions:      "keyboard-diagram-studio_menuActions__P2KR2",
  desc:         "keyboard-diagram-studio_menuDescription__0jiXX",
  field:        "keyboard-diagram-studio_field__pE7xQ",
  ctrl:         "keyboard-diagram-studio_control__vMrCj",
  colorCtrl:    "keyboard-diagram-studio_colorControl__YDWyI",
  colorRow:     "keyboard-diagram-studio_colorRow__UTNlr",
  colorInline:  "keyboard-diagram-studio_colorInlineRow__yRa7g",
  labelRow:     "keyboard-diagram-studio_labelSettingsRow__vRl7Q",
  swatchRow:    "keyboard-diagram-studio_swatchRow__tMV1_",
  swatchDiv:    "keyboard-diagram-studio_swatchDivider__QEXqc",
  swatch:       "keyboard-diagram-studio_colorSwatch__qFMhH",
  segRow:       "keyboard-diagram-studio_segmentRow__Usg0n",
  toggleSeg:    "keyboard-diagram-studio_toggleSegmentRow__SQB3i",
  toggleRow:    "keyboard-diagram-studio_toggleRow__MmGPi",
  toggleCtrl:   "keyboard-diagram-studio_toggleControl__QUarr",
  rangeRow:     "keyboard-diagram-studio_rangeRow__h7FlT",
  rangeCtrl:    "keyboard-diagram-studio_rangeControl__R7GD4",
  rangeVal:     "keyboard-diagram-studio_rangeValue__YV_KA",
  actionBtn:    "keyboard-diagram-studio_menuActionButton__umJIe",
  primaryBtn:   "keyboard-diagram-studio_primaryButton__MkUmh",
};

// ── state ──
const state = {
  noteCount: 12, startNote: "C",
  noteCountDraft: "12",
  sizeMode: "fit", customWidth: 1100, customHeight: 520,
  transparent: false, background: "#ffffff",
  whiteKeyColor: "#111111", blackKeyColor: "#ffffff", fontSize: 15,
  keyEdits: {}, textItems: [], dotItems: [],
  selection: { type: "stage" },
  activeMenu: null,
  fillOrLabel: "fill",
  labelKeyColor: "white",
  recentColors: [...ACC_COLORS],
  exportBusy: null,
  feedbackMsg: "",
  feedbackTimer: null,
};

// ── history ──
const hist = { undo: [], redo: [] };
function snap() {
  return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify({
    noteCount:state.noteCount, startNote:state.startNote,
    sizeMode:state.sizeMode, customWidth:state.customWidth, customHeight:state.customHeight,
    transparent:state.transparent, background:state.background,
    whiteKeyColor:state.whiteKeyColor, blackKeyColor:state.blackKeyColor, fontSize:state.fontSize,
    keyEdits:state.keyEdits, textItems:state.textItems, dotItems:state.dotItems,
  }));
}
function saveHist() {
  hist.undo.push(snap());
  if (hist.undo.length > 50) hist.undo.shift();
  hist.redo = [];
}
function applySnap(s) {
  Object.assign(state, JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(s)));
  state.noteCountDraft = String(s.noteCount);
  state.selection = { type: "stage" };
  state.feedbackMsg = "";
}
function doUndo() { if (!hist.undo.length) return; hist.redo.push(snap()); applySnap(hist.undo.pop()); renderAll(); }
function doRedo() { if (!hist.redo.length) return; hist.undo.push(snap()); applySnap(hist.redo.pop()); renderAll(); }

// ── keyboard math ──
function buildKbd(noteCount, startNote) {
  const si = NOTES.indexOf(startNote);
  let wc = 0; const keys = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < noteCount; i++) {
    const note = NOTES[(si + i) % 12];
    if (BLACK.has(note)) {
      keys.push({ id:`key-${i}`, note, flatNote: FLATS[note]||null, isBlack:true,
        x: Math.max(wc-1,0)*DIMS.ww + DIMS.ww - DIMS.bw/2,
        width:DIMS.bw, height:DIMS.bh, defaultFill:"#111111" });
    } else {
      keys.push({ id:`key-${i}`, note, flatNote:null, isBlack:false,
        x: wc*DIMS.ww, width:DIMS.ww, height:DIMS.wh, defaultFill:"#ffffff" });
      wc++;
    }
  }
  const kw = keys.reduce((m,k) => Math.max(m, k.x+k.width), wc*DIMS.ww);
  return { keys, kw };
}

function computeLayout(kw) {
  const pad = state.sizeMode==="match" ? {top:0,right:0,bottom:0,left:0} : PAD_FIT;
  const ih  = DIMS.la + DIMS.wh + DIMS.lb;
  const minW = Math.ceil(pad.left + kw + pad.right);
  const minH = Math.ceil(pad.top + ih + pad.bottom);
  let w, h;
  if (state.sizeMode==="custom") { w=Math.max(minW,state.customWidth); h=Math.max(minH,state.customHeight); }
  else if (state.sizeMode==="match") { w=kw+2; h=DIMS.wh+2; }
  else { w=minW; h=minH; }
  const kx = state.sizeMode==="match" ? 1 : Math.round((w-kw)/2);
  const extraH = Math.max(0, h-pad.top-pad.bottom-ih);
  const ky = state.sizeMode==="match" ? 1 : pad.top+DIMS.la+Math.round(extraH/2);
  return { w, h, minW, minH, kx, ky };
}

// ── SVG helpers ──
function esc(s){ return String(s).replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;").replace(/"/g,"&quot;"); }
function clamp(v,a,b){ return Math.min(b,Math.max(a,v)); }

function getFill(key) {
  const e = state.keyEdits[key.id] || {};
  const style = e.fillStyle || "solid";
  if (style==="transparent") return "transparent";
  const col = (e.fillColor && e.fillColor!=="transparent") ? e.fillColor : key.defaultFill;
  if (style==="solid") return col;
  return `url(#pat-${key.id})`;
}

function patternDef(key) {
  const e = state.keyEdits[key.id] || {};
  const style = e.fillStyle || "solid";
  if (style==="solid"||style==="transparent") return "";
  const col = e.fillColor || key.defaultFill;
  const bg  = key.isBlack ? "#101010" : "#ffffff";
  const pid = `pat-${key.id}`;
  const base = `<rect fill="${esc(bg)}" width="12" height="12" shape-rendering="geometricPrecision"/>`;
  if (style==="diagonal")   return `<pattern id="${pid}" width="12" height="12" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse" patternTransform="rotate(45)">${base}<path d="M 3 0 V 12" stroke="${esc(col)}" stroke-width="3"/><path d="M 9 0 V 12" stroke="${esc(col)}" stroke-width="3"/></pattern>`;
  if (style==="horizontal") return `<pattern id="${pid}" width="12" height="12" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">${base}<path d="M 0 4 H 14" stroke="${esc(col)}" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M 0 10 H 14" stroke="${esc(col)}" stroke-width="4"/></pattern>`;
  if (style==="vertical")   return `<pattern id="${pid}" width="12" height="12" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">${base}<path d="M 4 0 V 14" stroke="${esc(col)}" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M 10 0 V 14" stroke="${esc(col)}" stroke-width="4"/></pattern>`;
  return "";
}

function keyLabel(key, layout) {
  const e = state.keyEdits[key.id] || {};
  const lbl = e.label || ""; if (!lbl.trim()) return "";
  const lines = lbl.split("\n").slice(0,2);
  const fs  = e.labelFontSize || state.fontSize;
  const col = e.labelColor || (key.isBlack ? state.blackKeyColor : state.whiteKeyColor);
  const pos = e.labelPosition || "on";
  const cx  = layout.kx + key.x + key.width/2;
  const lh  = Math.round(1.18*fs);
  let y = pos==="above" ? layout.ky-12-(lines.length-1)*lh
         : pos==="below" ? layout.ky+DIMS.wh+28-(lines.length-1)*lh
         : layout.ky+key.height-18-(lines.length-1)*lh;
  const tspans = lines.map((l,i)=>`<tspan x="${cx}" dy="${i?lh:0}">${esc(l)}</tspan>`).join("");
  return `<text x="${cx}" y="${y}" text-anchor="middle" font-family='"Avenir Next","Segoe UI",sans-serif' font-size="${fs}" font-weight="700" fill="${esc(col)}" pointer-events="none">${tspans}</text>`;
}

function keyDot(key, layout) {
  const e = state.keyEdits[key.id] || {};
  if (!e.dotVisible) return "";
  const sz  = e.dotSize || Math.min(key.width-18,38);
  const fil = e.dotFillColor || e.dotColor || "#111111";
  const str = e.dotStrokeColor || "#111111";
  const sw  = e.dotStrokeWidth ?? 2;
  const pos = e.dotPosition || "on";
  const cx  = layout.kx + key.x + key.width/2;
  const cy  = pos==="above" ? layout.ky-18 : pos==="below" ? layout.ky+DIMS.wh+24 : layout.ky+0.58*key.height;
  return `<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="${sz/2}" fill="${esc(fil)}" stroke="${esc(str)}" stroke-width="${sw}"/>`;
}

// ── SVG render ──
let _lastKw = 0;
function renderSVG() {
  const { keys, kw } = buildKbd(state.noteCount, state.startNote);
  _lastKw = kw;
  const L = computeLayout(kw);
  const svg = document.getElementById('kbdSvg');
  document.getElementById('stageCanvas').style.setProperty('--stage-width', `${L.w}px`);
  svg.setAttribute('width', L.w);
  svg.setAttribute('height', L.h);
  svg.setAttribute('viewBox', `0 0 ${L.w} ${L.h}`);

  const sel = state.selection;

  // defs (patterns)
  const defs = keys.map(k=>patternDef(k)).join("");

  // background
  const bg = state.transparent ? "" :
    `<rect fill="${esc(state.background)}" width="${L.w}" height="${L.h}" rx="22" ry="22"/>`;

  // editor dash outline
  const outline = `<rect data-eo fill="none" width="${L.w-2}" height="${L.h-2}" x="1" y="1" rx="22" ry="22" stroke="rgba(0,172,195,0.5)" stroke-dasharray="10 8" stroke-width="2"/>`;

  // white keys
  let wk = "";
  keys.filter(k=>!k.isBlack).forEach(k=>{
    const selected = sel.type==="key" && sel.id===k.id;
    wk += `<rect data-key="${k.id}" cursor="pointer" fill="${esc(getFill(k))}" width="${k.width}" height="${k.height}" x="${L.kx+k.x}" y="${L.ky}" rx="3" ry="3" stroke="#121212" stroke-width="2"/>`;
    if (selected) wk += `<rect data-eo fill="none" width="${k.width+8}" height="${k.height+8}" x="${L.kx+k.x-4}" y="${L.ky-4}" rx="8" ry="8" stroke="#00acc3" stroke-width="3"/>`;
  });

  // black keys
  let bk = "";
  keys.filter(k=>k.isBlack).forEach(k=>{
    const selected = sel.type==="key" && sel.id===k.id;
    bk += `<rect data-key="${k.id}" cursor="pointer" fill="${esc(getFill(k))}" width="${k.width}" height="${k.height}" x="${L.kx+k.x}" y="${L.ky}" rx="4" ry="4" stroke="#121212" stroke-width="2"/>`;
    if (selected) bk += `<rect data-eo fill="none" width="${k.width+8}" height="${k.height+8}" x="${L.kx+k.x-4}" y="${L.ky-4}" rx="8" ry="8" stroke="#00acc3" stroke-width="3"/>`;
  });

  // key dots + labels
  const kdots  = keys.map(k=>keyDot(k,L)).join("");
  const klbls  = keys.map(k=>keyLabel(k,L)).join("");

  // floating dots
  let fdots = "";
  state.dotItems.forEach(d=>{
    const sz  = d.size||28;
    const isSel = sel.type==="dot" && sel.id===d.id;
    fdots += `<g data-dot="${d.id}" style="touch-action:none" cursor="move">`;
    if (isSel) fdots += `<rect data-eo fill="none" width="${sz+10}" height="${sz+10}" x="${d.x-sz/2-5}" y="${d.y-sz/2-5}" rx="999" ry="999" stroke="#00acc3" stroke-dasharray="8 6" stroke-width="2"/>`;
    fdots += `<circle data-eo cx="${d.x}" cy="${d.y}" r="${Math.max(sz/2+12,22)}" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.001)" pointer-events="all" style="touch-action:none"/>`;
    fdots += `<circle cx="${d.x}" cy="${d.y}" r="${sz/2}" fill="${esc(d.fillColor||'#111111')}" stroke="${esc(d.strokeColor||'#111111')}" stroke-width="${d.strokeWidth??2}" pointer-events="none"/>`;
    fdots += `</g>`;
  });

  // floating text
  let ftxts = "";
  state.textItems.forEach(t=>{
    const lines = (t.text||"Text").split("\n").slice(0,2);
    const fs    = t.fontSize||28;
    const tw    = lines.reduce((m,l)=>Math.max(m,l.length),1)*fs*0.62+24;
    const th    = lines.length*fs*1.18+14;
    const isSel = sel.type==="text" && sel.id===t.id;
    ftxts += `<g data-txt="${t.id}" style="touch-action:none" cursor="move">`;
    if (isSel) ftxts += `<rect data-eo fill="none" width="${tw}" height="${th}" x="${t.x-tw/2}" y="${t.y-fs}" rx="10" ry="10" stroke="#00acc3" stroke-dasharray="8 6" stroke-width="2"/>`;
    const tspans = lines.map((l,i)=>`<tspan x="${t.x}" dy="${i?1.16*fs:0}">${esc(l)}</tspan>`).join("");
    ftxts += `<text fill="${esc(t.color||'#111111')}" font-family='"Avenir Next","Segoe UI",sans-serif' font-size="${fs}" font-weight="700" text-anchor="${t.align||'middle'}" x="${t.x}" y="${t.y}" style="touch-action:none">${tspans}</text>`;
    ftxts += `</g>`;
  });

  svg.innerHTML = `<defs>${defs}</defs>${bg}${outline}${wk}${bk}${kdots}${fdots}${klbls}${ftxts}`;

  // attach key click handlers
  svg.querySelectorAll('[data-key]').forEach(el=>{
    el.addEventListener('click', e=>{
      e.stopPropagation();
      const id = el.dataset.key;
      state.selection = { type:"key", id };
      if (state.activeMenu!=="keyboard" && state.activeMenu!=="label-all") state.activeMenu = "keyboard";
      state.fillOrLabel = "fill";
      renderAll();
    });
  });

  // draggable floating items
  svg.querySelectorAll('[data-dot]').forEach(el=>{
    el.addEventListener('pointerdown', e=>startDrag(e,"dot",el.dataset.dot));
  });
  svg.querySelectorAll('[data-txt]').forEach(el=>{
    el.addEventListener('pointerdown', e=>startDrag(e,"text",el.dataset.txt));
  });

  // stage background click → deselect
  svg.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    if (state.selection.type!=="stage") {
      state.selection = { type:"stage" };
      renderAll();
    }
  });
}

// ── drag ──
let drag = null;
function svgPt(cx, cy) {
  const svg = document.getElementById('kbdSvg');
  const pt  = svg.createSVGPoint();
  pt.x = cx; pt.y = cy;
  return pt.matrixTransform(svg.getScreenCTM().inverse());
}
function startDrag(e, type, id) {
  e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation();
  const pt = svgPt(e.clientX, e.clientY);
  const item = type==="dot"
    ? state.dotItems.find(d=>d.id===id)
    : state.textItems.find(t=>t.id===id);
  if (!item) return;
  saveHist();
  drag = { type, id, ox:item.x-pt.x, oy:item.y-pt.y, moved:false, sx:e.clientX, sy:e.clientY };
  state.selection = { type, id };
  e.currentTarget.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
  window.addEventListener('pointermove', onDragMove, {passive:false});
  window.addEventListener('pointerup',   onDragEnd);
  window.addEventListener('pointercancel', onDragEnd);
  renderAll();
}
function onDragMove(e) {
  if (!drag) return;
  e.preventDefault();
  if (Math.hypot(e.clientX-drag.sx, e.clientY-drag.sy) > 6) drag.moved = true;
  const { kw } = buildKbd(state.noteCount, state.startNote);
  const L = computeLayout(kw);
  const pt = svgPt(e.clientX, e.clientY);
  const nx = pt.x + drag.ox, ny = pt.y + drag.oy;
  if (drag.type==="text") {
    const t = state.textItems.find(t=>t.id===drag.id);
    if (t) {
      const tw = Math.max(1,(t.text||"").split("\n")[0].length)*t.fontSize*0.62+24;
      t.x = clamp(nx, 12+tw/2, L.w-12-tw/2);
      t.y = clamp(ny, 20+t.fontSize, L.h-20);
    }
  } else {
    const d = state.dotItems.find(d=>d.id===drag.id);
    if (d) {
      const sz = d.size||28;
      d.x = clamp(nx, 12+sz/2, L.w-12-sz/2);
      d.y = clamp(ny, 20+sz/2, L.h-20);
    }
  }
  renderSVG();
}
function onDragEnd(e) {
  if (!drag) return;
  if (!drag.moved) {
    state.activeMenu = drag.type==="text" ? "text" : "dot";
  }
  drag = null;
  window.removeEventListener('pointermove', onDragMove);
  window.removeEventListener('pointerup',   onDragEnd);
  window.removeEventListener('pointercancel', onDragEnd);
  renderAll();
}

// ── menu rendering ──
function swatchesHTML(prefix, cb) {
  const swatches = state.recentColors.map(c=>
    `<button class="${C.swatch}" data-swatch-cb="${prefix}" data-color="${esc(c)}" style="background:${esc(c)}" aria-label="Use ${esc(c)}" type="button"></button>`
  ).join("");
  const fixed = FIXED_COLORS.map(f=>
    `<button class="${C.swatch}" data-swatch-cb="${prefix}" data-color="${esc(f.v)}" style="background:${esc(f.v)}" title="${f.l}" type="button"></button>`
  ).join("");
  return `<div class="${C.swatchRow}">${swatches}<span class="${C.swatchDiv}" aria-hidden="true"></span>${fixed}</div>`;
}

function segBtn(label, active, id) {
  return `<button class="${C.segBtn}${active?' '+C.segActive:''}" data-seg="${id}" type="button">${label}</button>`;
}

function renderMenu() {
  const panel = document.getElementById('menuPanel');
  const content = document.getElementById('menuContent');
  const menu = state.activeMenu;
  panel.style.display = menu ? '' : 'none';
  if (!menu) return;

  const sel = state.selection;
  const selKey = sel.type==="key" ? state.keyEdits[sel.id]||{} : null;
  const selKeyBase = sel.type==="key" ? (() => { const {keys}=buildKbd(state.noteCount,state.startNote); return keys.find(k=>k.id===sel.id); })() : null;
  const selText = sel.type==="text" ? state.textItems.find(t=>t.id===sel.id) : null;
  const selDot  = sel.type==="dot"  ? state.dotItems.find(d=>d.id===sel.id) : null;

  let html = "";

  if (menu==="keyboard") {
    html = `<div class="${C.panelBlock} ${C.compact}">
      <label class="${C.field}"><span>Number of notes</span>
        <input id="inp-noteCount" class="${C.ctrl}" type="number" min="1" max="26" value="${esc(state.noteCountDraft)}">
      </label>
      <label class="${C.field}"><span>Starting note</span>
        <select id="inp-startNote" class="${C.ctrl}">
          ${W_NOTES.map(n=>`<option${n===state.startNote?' selected':''}>${n}</option>`).join("")}
        </select>
      </label>
      <div class="${C.actions} ${C.wide}">
        <button class="${C.actionBtn}" data-action="resetFills" type="button">Reset all fills</button>
        <button class="${C.actionBtn}" data-action="clearTexts" type="button">Remove floating text</button>
        <button class="${C.actionBtn}" data-action="clearDots"  type="button">Remove floating dots</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;

    // if a key is selected, also show key panel inline
    if (sel.type==="key" && selKeyBase) {
      const e  = selKey;
      const fs = e.fillStyle || "solid";
      const fc = (e.fillColor && e.fillColor!=="transparent") ? e.fillColor : selKeyBase.defaultFill;
      const lc = e.labelColor || (selKeyBase.isBlack ? state.blackKeyColor : state.whiteKeyColor);
      const lfs= e.labelFontSize || state.fontSize;
      const fo = state.fillOrLabel;
      html += `<div class="${C.panelBlock} ${C.compact}">
        <div class="${C.segRow} ${C.toggleSeg} ${C.wide}">
          ${segBtn("Fill","fill"===fo,"fill")}
          ${segBtn("Label","label"===fo,"label")}
        </div>
        ${fo==="fill" ? `
          <label class="${C.field} ${C.wide}"><span>Fill style</span>
            <select id="key-fillStyle" class="${C.ctrl}">
              ${FILL_STYLES.map(s=>`<option${s===fs?' selected':''}>${s[0].toUpperCase()+s.slice(1)}</option>`).join("")}
            </select>
          </label>
          <label class="${C.field} ${C.wide}"><span>Fill color</span>
            <div class="${C.colorInline}">
              <input id="key-fillColor" class="${C.ctrl} ${C.colorCtrl}" type="color" value="${esc(fc)}">
              ${swatchesHTML("keyFill")}
            </div>
          </label>
        ` : `
          <label class="${C.field} ${C.wide}"><span>Key label</span>
            <input id="key-label" class="${C.ctrl}" type="text" placeholder="Type label" value="${esc(e.label||"")}">
          </label>
          <label class="${C.field} ${C.wide}"><span>Label placement</span>
            <select id="key-labelPos" class="${C.ctrl}">
              <option${(e.labelPosition||"on")==="on"?' selected':''} value="on">On key</option>
              <option${e.labelPosition==="above"?' selected':''} value="above">Above key</option>
              <option${e.labelPosition==="below"?' selected':''} value="below">Below key</option>
            </select>
          </label>
          <div class="${C.labelRow} ${C.wide}">
            <label class="${C.field}"><span>Label color</span>
              <div class="${C.colorInline}">
                <input id="key-labelColor" class="${C.ctrl} ${C.colorCtrl}" type="color" value="${esc(lc)}">
                ${swatchesHTML("keyLabel")}
              </div>
            </label>
            <label class="${C.field}"><span>Label size</span>
              <div class="${C.rangeRow}">
                <input id="key-labelSize" class="${C.rangeCtrl}" type="range" min="11" max="24" step="1" value="${lfs}">
                <span class="${C.rangeVal}" id="key-labelSizeVal">${lfs}px</span>
              </div>
            </label>
          </div>
        `}
      </div>`;
    }
  }

  if (menu==="label-all") {
    const lkc = state.labelKeyColor;
    const curC = lkc==="black" ? state.blackKeyColor : state.whiteKeyColor;
    html = `<div class="${C.panelBlock} ${C.compact}">
      <p class="${C.desc} ${C.wide}">Labels will be placed on the keys.</p>
      <div class="${C.segRow} ${C.toggleSeg} ${C.wide}">
        ${segBtn("White keys","white"===lkc,"whiteKeys")}
        ${segBtn("Black keys","black"===lkc,"blackKeys")}
      </div>
      <label class="${C.field} ${C.wide}"><span>Color</span>
        <div class="${C.colorInline}">
          <input id="la-color" class="${C.ctrl} ${C.colorCtrl}" type="color" value="${esc(curC)}">
          ${swatchesHTML("labelAll")}
        </div>
      </label>
      <label class="${C.field}"><span>Size</span>
        <div class="${C.rangeRow}">
          <input id="la-size" class="${C.rangeCtrl}" type="range" min="11" max="24" step="1" value="${state.fontSize}">
          <span class="${C.rangeVal}" id="la-sizeVal">${state.fontSize}px</span>
        </div>
      </label>
      <div class="${C.actions} ${C.wide}">
        <button class="${C.primaryBtn}" data-action="labelAll" type="button">Label all keys</button>
        <button class="${C.actionBtn}"  data-action="clearLabels" type="button">Clear all labels</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }

  if (menu==="text" && selText) {
    const t = selText;
    html = `<div class="${C.panelBlock} ${C.compact}">
      <label class="${C.field} ${C.wide}"><span>Text</span>
        <input id="txt-text" class="${C.ctrl}" type="text" value="${esc(t.text||"")}">
      </label>
      <label class="${C.field}"><span>Text color</span>
        <div class="${C.colorRow}">
          <input id="txt-color" class="${C.ctrl} ${C.colorCtrl}" type="color" value="${esc(t.color||'#111111')}">
          ${swatchesHTML("txtColor")}
        </div>
      </label>
      <label class="${C.field}"><span>Font size</span>
        <div class="${C.rangeRow}">
          <input id="txt-size" class="${C.rangeCtrl}" type="range" min="16" max="60" value="${t.fontSize||28}">
          <span class="${C.rangeVal}" id="txt-sizeVal">${t.fontSize||28}px</span>
        </div>
      </label>
    </div>`;
  } else if (menu==="text" && !selText) {
    html = `<div class="${C.panelBlock}"><p class="${C.desc}">Add text from the toolbar, then tap it to edit here.</p></div>`;
  }

  if (menu==="dot" && selDot) {
    const d = selDot;
    html = `<div class="${C.panelBlock} ${C.compact}">
      <label class="${C.field}"><span>Dot fill</span>
        <div class="${C.colorRow}">
          <input id="dot-fill" class="${C.ctrl} ${C.colorCtrl}" type="color" value="${esc(d.fillColor||'#111111')}">
          ${swatchesHTML("dotFill")}
        </div>
      </label>
      <label class="${C.field}"><span>Dot line</span>
        <div class="${C.colorRow}">
          <input id="dot-stroke" class="${C.ctrl} ${C.colorCtrl}" type="color" value="${esc(d.strokeColor||'#111111')}">
          ${swatchesHTML("dotStroke")}
        </div>
      </label>
      <label class="${C.field}"><span>Line width</span>
        <div class="${C.rangeRow}">
          <input id="dot-sw" class="${C.rangeCtrl}" type="range" min="0" max="8" value="${d.strokeWidth??2}">
          <span class="${C.rangeVal}" id="dot-swVal">${d.strokeWidth??2}px</span>
        </div>
      </label>
      <label class="${C.field}"><span>Dot size</span>
        <div class="${C.rangeRow}">
          <input id="dot-size" class="${C.rangeCtrl}" type="range" min="12" max="64" value="${d.size||28}">
          <span class="${C.rangeVal}" id="dot-sizeVal">${d.size||28}px</span>
        </div>
      </label>
    </div>`;
  } else if (menu==="dot" && !selDot) {
    html = `<div class="${C.panelBlock}"><p class="${C.desc}">Add a dot from the toolbar, then tap it to edit here.</p></div>`;
  }

  if (menu==="canvas") {
    const { kw } = buildKbd(state.noteCount, state.startNote);
    const L = computeLayout(kw);
    html = `
    <div class="${C.panelBlock} ${C.compact}">
      <label class="${C.toggleRow}">
        <span>Transparent background</span>
        <input id="cv-transparent" class="${C.toggleCtrl}" type="checkbox"${state.transparent?' checked':''}>
      </label>
      <label class="${C.field} ${C.wide}"><span>Background color</span>
        <input id="cv-bg" class="${C.ctrl} ${C.colorCtrl}" type="color" value="${esc(state.background)}"${state.transparent?' disabled':''}>
      </label>
    </div>
    <div class="${C.panelBlock} ${C.compact}">
      <div class="${C.field} ${C.wide}"><span>Canvas size</span>
        <div class="${C.segRow}">
          ${segBtn("Fit content",   state.sizeMode==="fit",    "fit")}
          ${segBtn("Custom",        state.sizeMode==="custom",  "custom")}
          ${segBtn("Match keyboard",state.sizeMode==="match",   "match")}
        </div>
      </div>
      ${state.sizeMode==="custom" ? `
        <label class="${C.field}"><span>Canvas width</span>
          <input id="cv-w" class="${C.ctrl}" type="number" min="${L.minW}" value="${state.customWidth}">
        </label>
        <label class="${C.field}"><span>Canvas height</span>
          <input id="cv-h" class="${C.ctrl}" type="number" min="${L.minH}" value="${state.customHeight}">
        </label>
      ` : ""}
    </div>`;
  }

  content.innerHTML = html;
  bindMenuEvents();
}

function bindMenuEvents() {
  const menu = state.activeMenu;
  const sel  = state.selection;

  // segment buttons
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-seg]').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
      const seg = btn.dataset.seg;
      if (seg==="fill"||seg==="label") { state.fillOrLabel=seg; renderMenu(); }
      if (seg==="whiteKeys") { state.labelKeyColor="white"; renderMenu(); }
      if (seg==="blackKeys") { state.labelKeyColor="black"; renderMenu(); }
      if (seg==="fit"||seg==="custom"||seg==="match") {
        saveHist();
        if (seg==="match") {
          const {kw}=buildKbd(state.noteCount,state.startNote);
          const L=computeLayout(kw);
          state.customWidth=L.minW; state.customHeight=L.minH;
        }
        state.sizeMode=seg; renderAll();
      }
    });
  });

  // action buttons
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-action]').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
      const a = btn.dataset.action;
      saveHist();
      if (a==="resetFills") {
        Object.keys(state.keyEdits).forEach(id=>{
          const e={...state.keyEdits[id]};
          delete e.fillColor; delete e.fillStyle;
          if (!Object.keys(e).length) delete state.keyEdits[id];
          else state.keyEdits[id]=e;
        });
        renderAll();
      }
      if (a==="clearTexts") { state.textItems=[]; if(sel.type==="text") state.selection={type:"stage"}; renderAll(); }
      if (a==="clearDots")  { state.dotItems=[]; if(sel.type==="dot") state.selection={type:"stage"}; renderAll(); }
      if (a==="labelAll") {
        const {keys}=buildKbd(state.noteCount,state.startNote);
        keys.forEach(k=>{
          const lbl = k.isBlack && k.flatNote ? `${k.note}\n${k.flatNote}` : k.note;
          const lkc = k.isBlack ? state.blackKeyColor : state.whiteKeyColor;
          state.keyEdits[k.id]={...state.keyEdits[k.id], label:lbl, labelColor:lkc, labelPosition:"on", labelFontSize:state.fontSize};
        });
        renderAll();
      }
      if (a==="clearLabels") {
        Object.keys(state.keyEdits).forEach(id=>{
          const e={...state.keyEdits[id]};
          delete e.label; delete e.labelColor; delete e.labelPosition; delete e.labelFontSize;
          if (!Object.keys(e).length) delete state.keyEdits[id];
          else state.keyEdits[id]=e;
        });
        renderAll();
      }
    });
  });

  // swatch buttons
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-swatch-cb]').forEach(btn=>{
    btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
      const cb  = btn.dataset.swatchCb;
      const col = btn.dataset.color;
      pushRecentColor(col);
      applyColorCb(cb, col);
    });
  });

  // keyboard panel inputs
  if (menu==="keyboard") {
    const ncInp = document.getElementById('inp-noteCount');
    if (ncInp) {
      ncInp.addEventListener('input', e=>{
        state.noteCountDraft = e.target.value;
        const n = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
        if (!isNaN(n) && n>=1 && n<=26) {
          saveHist(); state.noteCount=n; state.keyEdits={}; state.selection={type:"stage"};
          renderSVG(); renderToolbar();
        }
      });
      ncInp.addEventListener('blur', ()=>{
        const n=clamp(parseInt(state.noteCountDraft,10)||12,1,26);
        state.noteCount=n; state.noteCountDraft=String(n);
        state.keyEdits={}; state.selection={type:"stage"};
        renderAll();
      });
    }
    const snInp = document.getElementById('inp-startNote');
    if (snInp) snInp.addEventListener('change', e=>{
      saveHist(); state.startNote=e.target.value; state.keyEdits={}; state.selection={type:"stage"}; renderAll();
    });

    if (sel.type==="key") {
      const id = sel.id;
      function keyEdit(update) {
        if (!state.keyEdits[id]) state.keyEdits[id]={};
        Object.assign(state.keyEdits[id], update);
        // Clean up empty
        const e=state.keyEdits[id];
        if (!e.label) { delete e.label; delete e.labelColor; delete e.labelPosition; delete e.labelFontSize; }
        if (!e.fillStyle||e.fillStyle==="solid") delete e.fillStyle;
        if (Object.keys(e).length===0) delete state.keyEdits[id];
        else state.keyEdits[id]=e;
      }
      const fsEl = document.getElementById('key-fillStyle');
      if (fsEl) fsEl.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); keyEdit({fillStyle:e.target.value.toLowerCase()}); renderSVG(); });
      const fcEl = document.getElementById('key-fillColor');
      if (fcEl) fcEl.addEventListener('input', e=>{ keyEdit({fillColor:e.target.value}); renderSVG(); });
      if (fcEl) fcEl.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); pushRecentColor(e.target.value); });

      const lblEl = document.getElementById('key-label');
      if (lblEl) lblEl.addEventListener('input', e=>{ keyEdit({label:e.target.value,labelPosition:(state.keyEdits[id]?.labelPosition||"on"),labelColor:(state.keyEdits[id]?.labelColor||(selKeyBase?.isBlack?state.blackKeyColor:state.whiteKeyColor))}); renderSVG(); });
      const lpEl = document.getElementById('key-labelPos');
      if (lpEl) lpEl.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); keyEdit({labelPosition:e.target.value}); renderSVG(); });
      const lcEl = document.getElementById('key-labelColor');
      if (lcEl) lcEl.addEventListener('input', e=>{ keyEdit({labelColor:e.target.value}); renderSVG(); });
      if (lcEl) lcEl.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); pushRecentColor(e.target.value); });
      const lsEl = document.getElementById('key-labelSize');
      if (lsEl) lsEl.addEventListener('input', e=>{
        const v=parseInt(e.target.value,10);
        keyEdit({labelFontSize:v});
        const sp=document.getElementById('key-labelSizeVal'); if(sp) sp.textContent=v+"px";
        renderSVG();
      });
      if (lsEl) lsEl.addEventListener('change', ()=>saveHist());
    }
  }

  if (menu==="label-all") {
    const laC = document.getElementById('la-color');
    if (laC) laC.addEventListener('input', e=>{ applyColorCb("labelAll",e.target.value); });
    if (laC) laC.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); pushRecentColor(e.target.value); });
    const laS = document.getElementById('la-size');
    if (laS) laS.addEventListener('input', e=>{
      saveHist();
      const v=parseInt(e.target.value,10);
      state.fontSize=v;
      const sp=document.getElementById('la-sizeVal'); if(sp) sp.textContent=v+"px";
      // update existing labeled keys
      const {keys}=buildKbd(state.noteCount,state.startNote);
      keys.forEach(k=>{ if(state.keyEdits[k.id]?.label) state.keyEdits[k.id].labelFontSize=v; });
      renderSVG();
    });
  }

  if (menu==="text" && sel.type==="text") {
    const id = sel.id;
    function txtEdit(upd){ const t=state.textItems.find(t=>t.id===id); if(t) Object.assign(t,upd); }
    const ttEl = document.getElementById('txt-text');
    if (ttEl) ttEl.addEventListener('input', e=>{ txtEdit({text:e.target.value}); renderSVG(); });
    const tcEl = document.getElementById('txt-color');
    if (tcEl) tcEl.addEventListener('input', e=>{ txtEdit({color:e.target.value}); renderSVG(); });
    if (tcEl) tcEl.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); pushRecentColor(e.target.value); });
    const tsEl = document.getElementById('txt-size');
    if (tsEl) tsEl.addEventListener('input', e=>{
      const v=parseInt(e.target.value,10);
      txtEdit({fontSize:v});
      const sp=document.getElementById('txt-sizeVal'); if(sp) sp.textContent=v+"px";
      renderSVG();
    });
    if (tsEl) tsEl.addEventListener('change', ()=>saveHist());
  }

  if (menu==="dot" && sel.type==="dot") {
    const id = sel.id;
    function dotEdit(upd){ const d=state.dotItems.find(d=>d.id===id); if(d) Object.assign(d,upd); }
    const dfEl=document.getElementById('dot-fill');
    if (dfEl) dfEl.addEventListener('input', e=>{ dotEdit({fillColor:e.target.value}); renderSVG(); });
    if (dfEl) dfEl.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); pushRecentColor(e.target.value); });
    const dsEl=document.getElementById('dot-stroke');
    if (dsEl) dsEl.addEventListener('input', e=>{ dotEdit({strokeColor:e.target.value}); renderSVG(); });
    if (dsEl) dsEl.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); pushRecentColor(e.target.value); });
    const swEl=document.getElementById('dot-sw');
    if (swEl) swEl.addEventListener('input', e=>{
      const v=parseInt(e.target.value,10); dotEdit({strokeWidth:v});
      const sp=document.getElementById('dot-swVal'); if(sp) sp.textContent=v+"px";
      renderSVG();
    });
    if (swEl) swEl.addEventListener('change', ()=>saveHist());
    const szEl=document.getElementById('dot-size');
    if (szEl) szEl.addEventListener('input', e=>{
      const v=parseInt(e.target.value,10); dotEdit({size:v});
      const sp=document.getElementById('dot-sizeVal'); if(sp) sp.textContent=v+"px";
      renderSVG();
    });
    if (szEl) szEl.addEventListener('change', ()=>saveHist());
  }

  if (menu==="canvas") {
    const cvT=document.getElementById('cv-transparent');
    if (cvT) cvT.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); state.transparent=e.target.checked; renderAll(); });
    const cvB=document.getElementById('cv-bg');
    if (cvB) cvB.addEventListener('input', e=>{ state.background=e.target.value; renderSVG(); });
    if (cvB) cvB.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); pushRecentColor(e.target.value); });
    const cvW=document.getElementById('cv-w');
    if (cvW) cvW.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); state.customWidth=Math.max(parseInt(e.target.value,10)||state.customWidth, 100); renderAll(); });
    const cvH=document.getElementById('cv-h');
    if (cvH) cvH.addEventListener('change', e=>{ saveHist(); state.customHeight=Math.max(parseInt(e.target.value,10)||state.customHeight, 100); renderAll(); });
  }
}

// helper: find selected key base
let selKeyBase = null;
function getSelKeyBase() {
  if (state.selection.type!=="key") return null;
  const {keys}=buildKbd(state.noteCount,state.startNote);
  return keys.find(k=>k.id===state.selection.id)||null;
}

function applyColorCb(cb, col) {
  saveHist();
  const sel = state.selection;
  if (cb==="keyFill") {
    if (sel.type==="key") {
      if (!state.keyEdits[sel.id]) state.keyEdits[sel.id]={};
      state.keyEdits[sel.id].fillColor=col;
      renderSVG();
    }
  } else if (cb==="keyLabel") {
    if (sel.type==="key") {
      if (!state.keyEdits[sel.id]) state.keyEdits[sel.id]={};
      state.keyEdits[sel.id].labelColor=col;
      renderSVG();
    }
  } else if (cb==="labelAll") {
    const lkc = state.labelKeyColor;
    const prop = lkc==="black" ? "blackKeyColor" : "whiteKeyColor";
    state[prop]=col;
    // update existing labeled keys of this type
    const {keys}=buildKbd(state.noteCount,state.startNote);
    keys.forEach(k=>{
      if ((k.isBlack && lkc==="black") || (!k.isBlack && lkc==="white")) {
        if (state.keyEdits[k.id]?.label) state.keyEdits[k.id].labelColor=col;
      }
    });
    renderSVG();
  } else if (cb==="txtColor") {
    if (sel.type==="text") { const t=state.textItems.find(t=>t.id===sel.id); if(t){t.color=col;renderSVG();} }
  } else if (cb==="dotFill") {
    if (sel.type==="dot") { const d=state.dotItems.find(d=>d.id===sel.id); if(d){d.fillColor=col;renderSVG();} }
  } else if (cb==="dotStroke") {
    if (sel.type==="dot") { const d=state.dotItems.find(d=>d.id===sel.id); if(d){d.strokeColor=col;renderSVG();} }
  }
}

function pushRecentColor(col) {
  const c = col.toLowerCase();
  if (FIXED_COLORS.some(f=>f.v===c)) return;
  state.recentColors = [c, ...state.recentColors.filter(r=>r!==c)].slice(0,8);
}

// ── toolbar rendering ──
function renderToolbar() {
  const sel = state.selection;
  const hasSelItem = sel.type==="text"||sel.type==="dot";
  const canUndo = hist.undo.length > 0;
  const canRedo = hist.redo.length > 0;
  const menus = ["keyboard","label-all","canvas"];
  const am = state.activeMenu;

  const pairs = [
    ["btn-keyboard","mbtn-keyboard","keyboard"],
    ["btn-label-all","mbtn-label-all","label-all"],
    ["btn-canvas","mbtn-canvas","canvas"],
  ];
  pairs.forEach(([did,mid,key])=>{
    const d=document.getElementById(did), m=document.getElementById(mid);
    if (d) { d.classList.toggle(C.btnActive,  am===key); }
    if (m) { m.classList.toggle(C.mbtnActive, am===key); }
  });

  const delD=document.getElementById('btn-delete'), delM=document.getElementById('mbtn-delete');
  if (delD) { delD.disabled=!hasSelItem; delD.classList.toggle(C.danger, hasSelItem); }
  if (delM) { delM.disabled=!hasSelItem; delM.classList.toggle(C.danger, hasSelItem); }

  ["btn-undo","mbtn-undo"].forEach(id=>{ const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.disabled=!canUndo; });
  ["btn-redo","mbtn-redo"].forEach(id=>{ const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el) el.disabled=!canRedo; });

  // export button labels
  const busy = state.exportBusy;
  const epng=document.getElementById('btn-exportPNG'); if(epng) epng.textContent=busy==="png"?"Exporting…":"Export PNG";
  const esvg=document.getElementById('btn-exportSVG'); if(esvg) esvg.textContent=busy==="svg"?"Saving SVG…":"Export SVG";
  const copy=document.getElementById('btn-copyPNG'); if(copy) copy.textContent=busy==="copy"?"Copying…":"Copy PNG";
  const mepng=document.getElementById('mbtn-exportPNG'); if(mepng) mepng.textContent=busy==="png"?"Exporting…":"Export PNG";
  const mesvg=document.getElementById('mbtn-exportSVG'); if(mesvg) mesvg.textContent=busy==="svg"?"Saving…":"Export SVG";
  const mcopy=document.getElementById('mbtn-copyPNG'); if(mcopy) mcopy.textContent=busy==="copy"?"Copying…":"Copy PNG";
}

function renderAll() {
  renderSVG();
  renderMenu();
  renderToolbar();
}

// ── export ──
function svgBlob() {
  const svg = document.getElementById('kbdSvg');
  const clone = svg.cloneNode(true);
  clone.querySelectorAll('[data-eo]').forEach(el=>el.remove());
  clone.setAttribute('xmlns','http://www.w3.org/2000/svg');
  clone.setAttribute('xmlns:xlink','http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink');
  return new Blob([new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(clone)], {type:"image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8"});
}
async function pngBlob() {
  const blob = svgBlob();
  const url  = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  try {
    const img = new Image();
    img.decoding = "async";
    await new Promise((res,rej)=>{ img.onload=res; img.onerror=rej; img.src=url; });
    const {kw}=buildKbd(state.noteCount,state.startNote);
    const L=computeLayout(kw);
    const scale = Math.max(2, Math.ceil(window.devicePixelRatio||1));
    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
    canvas.width = L.w*scale; canvas.height = L.h*scale;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    ctx.scale(scale,scale);
    ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, L.w, L.h);
    return await new Promise(res=>canvas.toBlob(res,"image/png"));
  } finally { URL.revokeObjectURL(url); }
}
function download(blob, filename) {
  const a=document.createElement('a'), url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  a.href=url; a.download=filename; a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}
function showFeedback(msg) {
  const el=document.getElementById('feedbackToast');
  if (!el) return;
  state.feedbackMsg=msg;
  el.textContent=msg; el.style.display='';
  if (state.feedbackTimer) clearTimeout(state.feedbackTimer);
  state.feedbackTimer = setTimeout(()=>{ el.style.display='none'; state.feedbackMsg=''; }, 2400);
}
async function doExportPNG() {
  if (state.exportBusy) return;
  state.exportBusy="png"; renderToolbar();
  try { const b=await pngBlob(); download(b,"keyboard-diagram.png"); showFeedback("PNG downloaded"); }
  catch(e){ showFeedback("PNG export failed"); }
  finally { state.exportBusy=null; renderToolbar(); }
}
function doExportSVG() {
  if (state.exportBusy) return;
  state.exportBusy="svg"; renderToolbar();
  try { download(svgBlob(),"keyboard-diagram.svg"); showFeedback("SVG downloaded"); }
  catch(e){ showFeedback("SVG export failed"); }
  finally { state.exportBusy=null; renderToolbar(); }
}
async function doCopyPNG() {
  if (state.exportBusy) return;
  state.exportBusy="copy"; renderToolbar();
  try {
    const b=await pngBlob();
    if (navigator.clipboard?.write && typeof ClipboardItem!=="undefined") {
      await navigator.clipboard.write([new ClipboardItem({[b.type]:Promise.resolve(b)})]);
      showFeedback("PNG copied to clipboard");
    } else {
      download(b,"keyboard-diagram.png");
      showFeedback("PNG downloaded instead");
    }
  } catch(e){ showFeedback("Copy not available — PNG downloaded"); try{ download(await pngBlob(),"keyboard-diagram.png"); }catch(e2){} }
  finally { state.exportBusy=null; renderToolbar(); }
}

// ── add items ──
function addText() {
  const {kw}=buildKbd(state.noteCount,state.startNote);
  const L=computeLayout(kw);
  const n=state.textItems.length;
  const item={id:`text-${Date.now()}-${n}`, text:"New text", x:L.w/2, y:Math.max(34,.5*L.kx+n%3*28), fontSize:28, color:"#111111", align:"middle"};
  saveHist();
  state.textItems.push(item);
  state.selection={type:"text",id:item.id};
  state.activeMenu="text";
  renderAll();
}
function addDot() {
  const {kw}=buildKbd(state.noteCount,state.startNote);
  const L=computeLayout(kw);
  const n=state.dotItems.length;
  const item={id:`dot-${Date.now()}-${n}`, x:L.w/2, y:Math.max(52,L.ky-48+n%3*34), size:28, fillColor:"#111111", strokeColor:"#111111", strokeWidth:2};
  saveHist();
  state.dotItems.push(item);
  state.selection={type:"dot",id:item.id};
  state.activeMenu="dot";
  renderAll();
}
function deleteSelected() {
  const sel=state.selection;
  if (sel.type==="text") {
    saveHist(); state.textItems=state.textItems.filter(t=>t.id!==sel.id); state.selection={type:"stage"};
  } else if (sel.type==="dot") {
    saveHist(); state.dotItems=state.dotItems.filter(d=>d.id!==sel.id); state.selection={type:"stage"};
  }
  renderAll();
}
function doReset() {
  saveHist();
  state.noteCount=12; state.noteCountDraft="12"; state.startNote="C";
  state.sizeMode="fit"; state.customWidth=1100; state.customHeight=520;
  state.transparent=false; state.background="#ffffff";
  state.whiteKeyColor="#111111"; state.blackKeyColor="#ffffff"; state.fontSize=15;
  state.keyEdits={}; state.textItems=[]; state.dotItems=[];
  state.selection={type:"stage"}; state.activeMenu=null;
  renderAll();
}

// ── wire toolbar buttons ──
function toggleMenu(key) {
  state.activeMenu = state.activeMenu===key ? null : key;
  renderAll();
}

[
  ["btn-keyboard","keyboard"],["mbtn-keyboard","keyboard"],
  ["btn-label-all","label-all"],["mbtn-label-all","label-all"],
  ["btn-canvas","canvas"],["mbtn-canvas","canvas"],
].forEach(([id,key])=>{
  document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('click',()=>toggleMenu(key));
});
["btn-addText","mbtn-addText"].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('click',addText));
["btn-addDot","mbtn-addDot"].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('click',addDot));
["btn-delete","mbtn-delete"].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('click',deleteSelected));
["btn-undo","mbtn-undo"].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('click',doUndo));
["btn-redo","mbtn-redo"].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('click',doRedo));
["btn-reset","mbtn-reset"].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('click',doReset));
["btn-exportPNG","mbtn-exportPNG"].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('click',doExportPNG));
["btn-exportSVG","mbtn-exportSVG"].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('click',doExportSVG));
["btn-copyPNG","mbtn-copyPNG"].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id)?.addEventListener('click',doCopyPNG));
document.getElementById('menuCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click',()=>{ state.activeMenu=null; renderAll(); });

// Delete key shortcut
window.addEventListener('keydown', e=>{
  if (e.key!=="Delete"&&e.key!=="Backspace") return;
  const t=document.activeElement;
  if (t instanceof HTMLInputElement||t instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement||t instanceof HTMLSelectElement||t?.isContentEditable) return;
  const sel=state.selection;
  if (sel.type==="text"||sel.type==="dot") { e.preventDefault(); deleteSelected(); }
});

// ── init ──
renderAll();
</script>
</div>
```
